setup: One-shot bootstrap: Node check, .env creation, secret generation, install, build libs, validate env (see docs/GETTING-STARTED.md). Note: run as `pnpm run setup` — bare `pnpm setup` invokes pnpm's own built-in command (ADS-993).
prepare: Husky git-hooks install (runs automatically after `pnpm install`).
dev: Run every workspace package's dev script via Turbo, in parallel (apps + gateway + services).
dev:apps: Run only the three frontend apps' dev servers (no backend, Docker, or DB).
dev:services: Start Postgres + Redis in Docker (detached) for native (non-Docker) backend dev.
docker:dev: Preflight-checked full Docker dev stack (foreground). The primary dev workflow — see docs/DOCKER.md.
docker:dev:detach: Same as docker:dev, but starts the stack in the background.
docker:dev:build: Force-rebuild the shared dev image, then start the stack. Use after editing Dockerfile.dev or pulling a lockfile change the auto-detection missed.
docker:dev:client: Legacy: start only the app.client profile via the docker-dev.mjs preflight. Prefer `docker:dev` (full stack) unless you specifically need a single-app profile.
docker:dev:admin: Legacy: start only the app.admin profile via the docker-dev.mjs preflight. Prefer `docker:dev` (full stack) unless you specifically need a single-app profile.
docker:dev:rescue: Legacy: start only the app.rescue profile via the docker-dev.mjs preflight. Prefer `docker:dev` (full stack) unless you specifically need a single-app profile.
docker:dev:raw: Escape hatch: raw `docker compose up`, skipping the docker-dev.mjs preflight (Docker check, .env validation, Redis port check, stale-volume detection). Use only when debugging the preflight itself.
docker:dev:legacy: Escape hatch: old per-service heavy build (each service builds its own Dockerfile.service/Dockerfile.app image instead of the shared dev image). Much slower; use only if the shared dev image is broken.
docker:reset: Stop containers AND wipe volumes — destroys the local Postgres data. Use to recover from a broken/stale DB volume.
docker:logs: Follow logs for every container in the stack.
docker:logs:apps: Follow logs for the three frontend app containers only.
docker:logs:infra: Follow logs for database, redis, and nats only.
docker:logs:services: Follow logs for every extracted microservice except the gateway.
docker:ps: Show container status + ports for the running stack.
docker:shell:db: Open a psql shell inside the database container.
build: Build every workspace package via Turbo (dependency-ordered: libs before apps).
build:apps: Build only the three frontend apps.
test: Run tests for every workspace package via Turbo (no coverage thresholds — see test:coverage tier in CONTRIBUTING.md).
test:watch: Vitest watch mode at the workspace root — reruns affected tests on save; pass a path/pattern to filter (ADS-944).
test:changed: Run only tests affected by files changed since origin/main (Vitest --changed; ADS-944).
test:e2e: Run the full Playwright suite against a running Docker stack.
test:e2e:single: Alias of test:e2e (kept for muscle-memory / CI script parity).
test:e2e:ui: Playwright interactive UI mode — pick tests, watch live, time-travel debug.
test:e2e:headed: Run the Playwright suite in a visible browser window.
test:e2e:report: Open the last Playwright HTML report.
test:e2e:install: Install Playwright browsers (~200MB) — needed once before test:e2e works.
lint: Lint every workspace package via Turbo.
lint:fix: Lint every workspace package via Turbo, auto-fixing what ESLint can.
type-check: TypeScript type-check every workspace package via Turbo.
format: Prettier-format every workspace package plus root-level files.
format:check: Prettier --check (no writes) across every workspace package plus root-level files.
format:root: Prettier-format root-level files only (scripts/, docs/, top-level configs) — called by `format`.
format:root:check: Prettier --check on root-level files only — called by `format:check`.
ci:local: Full CI-equivalent preflight (~3-5min): format, lint, type-check, test, plus every check:* guard.
ci:local:quick: Fast preflight (~30s): format + lint + type-check only.
clean: Clean every workspace package's build output via Turbo, then remove root node_modules.
prod:build: Build the production Docker images locally.
prod:up: Start the production Docker stack locally for a smoke test (does not deploy anywhere — see `make` targets in README for real deploys).
prod:down: Stop the local production Docker stack.
secrets:generate: Print freshly generated JWT/session/encryption/Postgres/Redis secrets — append the output to .env.
validate:env: Validate the active .env against the required-var schema and diff it against .env.example.
graph: Render the Turbo build/dependency graph to docs/dependency-graph.html.
graph:tasks: Print the Turbo task graph to the terminal.
cache:status: Report whether Turbo remote caching is linked for this checkout.
check:lib-tests: Guard: fail if any lib.* package has zero test files.
check:workspaces: Guard: fail if package.json workspaces and the filesystem disagree (orphaned/missing package dirs).
check:env-example: Guard: fail if a var scripts/validate-env.ts requires is missing from .env.example's REQUIRED banner.
check:workflow-paths: Guard: fail if a GitHub Actions workflow references a path that doesn't exist.
check:docker-pinning: Guard: fail if a Dockerfile/compose file uses an unpinned (non-digest) base image.
check:docs-index: Guard: fail if a docs/**/*.md file isn't linked from docs/README.md.
check:docs-script-refs: Guard: fail if a doc references a `pnpm run <script>` that doesn't exist.
check:docs-freshness: Report (non-blocking): broken internal/external doc links and docs untouched for 12+ months.
check:readmes: Report (non-blocking): workspace READMEs missing a section from docs/templates/README.{app,service,lib}.md.
ratchet:coverage: Raise the persisted test-coverage-threshold floor towards current measured coverage (never lowers it).
ratchet:stories-coverage: Raise the persisted Storybook stories-coverage floor towards current measured coverage (never lowers it).
generate:dependency-docs: Regenerate docs/libraries/*-consumers.md and the docs/README.md library-consumer-lists block.
test:scripts: Run the Vitest suite for the repo-automation scripts themselves (scripts/*.test.mjs).
tasks: Print the full categorised script index as a Markdown table (alias of the docs/tasks.md generator — see also `pnpm run help` for a terminal-friendly version).
tasks:write: Regenerate docs/tasks.md from the current package.json scripts.
help: Print every root script, grouped by category with a one-line description — the terminal-friendly discovery entry point (source: scripts/script-descriptions.json). Note: run as `pnpm run help` — bare `pnpm help` invokes pnpm's own built-in help command.
hooks:enable: Enable the opt-in pre-push hook (runs ci:local:quick before every git push).
hooks:status: Show whether the pre-push hook is currently enabled.
new-app: Scaffold a new apps/<name> package from scripts/templates/app/.
new-lib: Scaffold a new packages/lib.<name> package from scripts/templates/lib/.
